synopsis: Landing on Stenos to hunt for Bossk and IG-88, Lando and Luke leave Chewbacca and R2-D2 with the *Millennium Falcon* and head into the capital. In a cantina, Lando is recognized by his old enemy Barpotomous Drebble, who offers a 10,000-credit bounty for his capture, igniting a blasterfight as patrons scramble for the reward. Luke collapses part of the building with his lightsaber to cover their escape, then spots Bossk and gives chase, only to circle back into another bounty-hungry crowd. Separated from Lando, Luke encounters Rik Duel and Dani, who survived their last Stenos ordeal by pinning the blame on Governor Matrin. Duel enlists Luke's help finding his missing partner Chihdo. Meanwhile Lando believes he has found Han, spotting a carbonite slab being hauled through the streets, and he and Luke follow it into a large building. The frozen figure turns out to be Chihdo, used as bait: Bossk, IG-88C, and a band of bounty hunters surround the two Rebels.
title: Star Wars (1977) #71: Return to Stenos
